name: VEON Ltd.
description: VEON is a global digital operator that provides connectivity and digital services to over 150 million customers across five emerging markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, the company focuses on transforming lives through technology-driven services in sectors such as finance, entertainment, education, and healthcare. By leveraging a decentralized leadership model, VEON empowers its local management teams to tailor digital solutions to the specific needs of their markets. With a commitment to high-speed connectivity and digital growth, VEON continues to drive economic development and innovation for more than 6% of the world’s population.
